vocab.meaning: nguồn tài nguyên mang tính giáo dục/sư phạm
vocab.example: I frequently navigate toward websites that function as a pedagogical resource to refine my coding skills.

vocab.meaning: các cuộc thảo luận kích thích trí tuệ
vocab.example: I’m drawn to editorial sites that foster intellectual stimulating discourse on global socioeconomic shifts.
What keeps me returning to certain project management sites is their multifaceted functionality, ranging from cloud storage to team chat.
I often visit political blogs specifically for their incisive commentary, which offers a deeper look than standard headlines.
For my scholarly pursuits, I rely heavily on digital archives that house rare historical manuscripts.

vocab.meaning: những góc khuất/ít người biết trên mạng
vocab.example: I occasionally enjoy exploring a clandestine corner of the web where hobbyists share vintage film restoration tips.

vocab.meaning: khả năng tiếp cận vô song
vocab.example: The unrivaled accessibility of online dictionaries has made physical volumes almost obsolete for me.

vocab.meaning: tổng hợp các góc nhìn đa dạng
vocab.example: I value platforms capable of aggregating diverse perspectives, allowing me to form a well-rounded opinion on current events.

vocab.meaning: năng lực/sự điêu luyện về kỹ thuật
vocab.example: Websites that demonstrate great technical prowess in their design often provide the most stable and fast-loading experiences.

vocab.meaning: trải nghiệm giàu tác động giác quan (hình ảnh, âm thanh)
vocab.example: Art gallery websites now offer a sensory-rich experience with high-definition virtual tours of their latest exhibitions.
